title: Excalibur | Curios API & Accessories Support
description: Excalibur Support for Curios and Accessories Mods
body:
This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) and [Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Features**
- Redesigned interface for secondary equipment panels and item slots.

**Credits**
- Maffhew – Creator of _Excalibur_
- TheIllusiveC4 – Creator of _Curios API_
- Blodhgarm – Creator of _Accesories_

If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰

[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-curios-api-support)
